summary: Iteration 4 testing complete. Tested new LinkedIn Import (parse/apply) endpoints, Profile linkedin_url field, and Interview body_language block. All 14 backend pytest tests PASSED. Frontend UI flows verified: Profile LinkedIn import (parse -> review -> apply -> skills merge) and Interview landing + question generation + video panel with iv-enable-cam / iv-record / iv-video / iv-answer-0 all present. iv-mic testid successfully removed.

issues: Toast 'Interview started' appears behind the top-right profile/logout icons in the header (see screenshot). Minor z-index/positioning issue - toast partially obscured.

action_items: Optional: Adjust z-index/positioning of the top-right toast so it isn't overlapped by the profile+logout icons on the Interview page.

Consider: review-name checkbox only renders when LLM returns a non-null name. This is correct behavior, but the review card should show a subtle 'no name detected' hint when name is null so the UI feels complete.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `parse_json_from_text` regex `\{.*\}` with DOTALL may match too much if LLM emits multiple JSON blocks; consider non-greedy or first-object matching. Not blocking now.

linkedin_apply endpoint: `updates.setdefault('target_role', ...)` from headline is dead code because condition `not user.get('target_role')` combined with the earlier `if inp.target_role` branch. Works correctly but logic is confusing - could simplify.

Backend: body_language aggregation treats entries with values <= 0 as missing. If a genuine 0 score is captured (e.g. head fully turned away) it will be ignored. Consider explicit null check instead of `> 0` filter.
Frontend Interview.jsx: iv-record and iv-answer input both exist; ensure record disables textarea while capturing to avoid double answers.
test_credentials: Fresh signup via POST /api/auth/signup (see /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Frontend localStorage key for JWT is 'tiq_token' (not 'token').
seed_data_creation: Created 3 test users (qa+iter4_<ts>@talentiq.dev, qa+ui4b_<ts>@talentiq.dev, qa+ui4c_<ts>@talentiq.dev) via signup. Also created 2 interview docs and multiple resume records via test flows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend JWT is stored in localStorage under key 'tiq_token'. When bypassing UI signup in playwright, use `localStorage.setItem('tiq_token', token)` before navigating to protected routes; the AuthContext calls /api/auth/me on mount to hydrate the user. The signup form's data-testid selectors work fine (signup-name/email/password/submit). LinkedIn parse takes ~5-10s and requires raw_text >= 40 chars. Interview /start takes ~10-20s to generate questions. Camera access is unavailable in headless so only verify iv-enable-cam/iv-record/iv-video/iv-answer-0 render — do NOT click record.
rca of the issue: No production bugs found. Minor observation: The 'Interview started' toast on the Interview page renders in the top-right and visually overlaps with the profile/logout icon buttons in the header (see screenshot). Both are visible but a subtle z-index/margin adjustment would improve polish.
